title: micromeria graeca var. consentina
intro: Micromeria graeca var. consentina, also known as the Greek mountain tea, is a subspecies of the Micromeria graeca plant, a type of flowering plant native to Greece and the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micromeria graeca var. consentina include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, often in combination with other herbs, and can also be used in infusions or as a tincture.
